item.summary: Product was made with milk powder recalled by the supplier due to Salmonella contamination. Product details: VG7274D1 Natural Cream of Mushroom Type Flavor, Net Weight: 50 lbs. bag. Item #: R5302. For Further Processing. Fontana Flavors, Janesville, WI.
